response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified the song 'CH4NGE' from the on-screen text. The credits showed 'Original: Giga' and 'Cover: Amane Kanata'. I split the video into two scenes: the initial black screen and the performance itself. I performed a web search using the query 'CH4NGE Giga Japanese and English lyrics' and successfully retrieved the relevant lyrics.
response.global_summary: A music video performance featuring a 3D animated character singing 'CH4NGE', originally by Giga, performed by Amane Kanata. The video begins with a short black-screen intro before the song starts.

scenes.description: Black screen before the performance starts.
Amane Kanata's animated avatar performs the song 'CH4NGE' on a stage with a futuristic backdrop. On-screen text in the lower-left corner lists the song title, original composer, and performer.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
とべ、起こせ! 願うは事故
一世一代さあ何賭す？
自問自答
勝つか負けるか
ドローなんてないわ
幕開けるわ
カッチンして ラッキーマニー
どっちもむりー…
(Cigar Cigar( ´ー`)y-~~)
引けるか否か 自分次第だな
余裕で! 振り切り全BETだぜいイェイ☆
そこどけ! そう このエース かっさらうのは あたしだ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Fly, make a move! I didn't mean to wish
Once in a lifetime, come on, what will you bet?
I ask myself
Will I win or will I lose?
There's no such thing as a draw
The curtain is rising
I'll "kachin" and make some lucky money
Both are impossible, huh?
(Cigar Cigar...)
Can I pull it off or not? It's up to me
Easy! I'm going all in with a full BET, yeah!
Get out of the way! I'm the one who'll steal the ace!
